member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.CrossFirebaseStorage.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets if the plugin is supported on the current platform.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.CrossFirebaseStorage.Current
member.summary: Current plugin implementation to use

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.CrossFirebaseStorage.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose of everything

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IFirebaseStorage
member.summary: FirebaseStorage is a service that supports uploading and downloading binary objects, such as images, videos, and other files to Google Cloud Storage.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IFirebaseStorage.GetRootReference
member.summary: Creates a new IStorageReference initialized at the root Firebase Storage location.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IFirebaseStorage.GetReferenceFromUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a IStorageReference given a gs:// or // URL pointing to a Firebase Storage location.
member.param: A gs:// or http[s]:// URL used to initialize the reference. For example, you can pass in a download URL retrieved from GetDownloadUrlAsync(). An error is thrown if the url is not associated with the FirebaseApp used to initialize this FirebaseStorage.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IFirebaseStorage.GetReferenceFromPath(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new IStorageReference initialized with a child Firebase Storage location.
member.param: A relative path from the root to initialize the reference with, for instance "path/to/object"

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageListResult.Items
member.summary: The items (files) returned by the ListAsync() operation.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageListResult.Prefixes
member.summary: The prefixes (folders) returned by the ListAsync() operation.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageListResult.PageToken
member.summary: Returns a token that can be used to resume a previous ListAsync() operation. null indicates that there are no more results.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata
member.summary: Class which represents the metadata on an object in Firebase Storage. This metadata is returned on successful operations, and can be used to retrieve download URLs, content types, and a storage reference to the object in question.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.Bucket
member.summary: The name of the bucket containing this object.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.Generation
member.summary: The content generation of this object. Used for object versioning.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.MetaGeneration
member.summary: The version of the metadata for this object at this generation. Used for preconditions and for detecting changes in metadata. A metageneration number is only meaningful in the context of a particular generation of a particular object.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.Name
member.summary: The name of this object, in gs://bucket/path/to/object.txt, this is object.txt.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.Path
member.summary: The full path of this object, in gs://bucket/path/to/object.txt, this is path/to/object.txt.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.Size
member.summary: Content-Length of the data in bytes.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.CacheControl
member.summary: Cache-Control directive for the object data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.ContentDisposition
member.summary: Content-Disposition of the object data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.ContentEncoding
member.summary: Content-Encoding of the object data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.ContentLanguage
member.summary: Content-Language of the object data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.ContentType
member.summary: Content-Type of the object data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.CustomMetadata
member.summary: User-provided metadata, in key/value pairs.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.MD5Hash
member.summary: MD5 hash of the data; encoded using base64.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.StorageReference
member.summary: A reference to the object in Firebase Storage.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.CreationTime
member.summary: The time the IStorageReference was created.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata.UpdatedTime
member.summary: The time the IStorageReference was last updated.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference
member.summary: IStorageReference represents a reference to a Google Cloud Storage object. Developers can upload and download objects, as well as get/set object metadata, and delete an object at the path.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.GetChild(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new IStorageReference pointing to a child object of the current reference. path = foo child = bar newPath = foo/bar path = foo/bar child = baz newPath = foo/bar/baz. All leading and trailing slashes will be removed, and consecutive slashes will be compressed to single slashes. For example: child = /foo/bar newPath = foo/bar child = foo/bar/ newPath = foo/bar child = foo///bar newPath = foo/bar
member.param: Path to append to the current path.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.PutBytes(System.Byte[],Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata)
member.summary:
Uploads a byte array to firebase storage bucket.
CAUTION: Although this method returns an IStorageUploadTask, which has an AwaitAsync() method, the upload will start immediately on iOS

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.PutFile(System.String,Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata)
member.summary:
Uploads a file via it's file path to firebase storage bucket.
CAUTION: Although this method returns an IStorageUploadTask, which has an AwaitAsync() method, the upload will start immediately on iOS

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.PutStream(System.IO.Stream,Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata)
member.summary:
Uploads a file via it's data stream to firebase storage bucket.
CAUTION: Although this method returns an IStorageUploadTask, which has an AwaitAsync() method, the upload will start immediately on iOS

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.GetMetadataAsync
member.summary: Retrieves metadata associated with an object at the current path.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.UpdateMetadataAsync(Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageMetadata)
member.summary: Updates the metadata associated with an object at the current path.
member.param: An IStorageMetaData object with the metadata to update.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.GetDownloadUrlAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a long lived download URL with a revocable token. This can be used to share the file with others, but can be revoked by a developer in the Firebase Console if desired.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.ListAsync(System.Int64)
member.summary: List up to maxResults items (files) and prefixes (folders) under this IStorageReference. “/” is treated as a path delimiter. Firebase Storage does not support unsupported object paths that end with “/” or contain two consecutive “/"s. All invalid objects in GCS will be filtered. ListAsync(maxResults) is only available for projects using Firebase Rules Version 2.
member.param: The maximum number of results to return in a single page. Must be greater than 0 and at most 1000.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.ListAllAsync
member.summary: List all items (files) and prefixes (folders) under this IStorageReference. This is a helper method for calling ListAsync() repeatedly until there are no more results. Consistency of the result is not guaranteed if objects are inserted or removed while this operation is executing. All results are buffered in memory. ListAllAsync() is only available for projects using Firebase Rules Version 2.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.GetStreamAsync(System.Int64)
member.summary: Asynchronously downloads the object at the IStorageReference to memory. The provided max size will be allocated, so ensure that the device has enough free memory to complete the download. For downloading large files, DownloadFile(destinationPath) may be a better option.
member.param: The maximum size in bytes to download. If the download exceeds this size the task will be cancelled and an error will be returned.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.GetBytesAsync(System.Int64)
member.summary: Asynchronously downloads the object from this IStorageReference. A byte array will be allocated large enough to hold the entire file in memory. Therefore, using this method will impact memory usage of your process. If you are downloading many large files, getStream may be a better option.
member.param: The maximum allowed size in bytes that will be allocated. Set this parameter to prevent out of memory conditions from occurring. If the download exceeds this limit, the task will fail and an IndexOutOfBoundsException will be returned. ///

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.DownloadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously downloads the object at the current path to a specified system filepath.
member.param: A file system URL representing the path the object should be downloaded to.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.DeleteAsync
member.summary: Deletes the object at the current path.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.Parent
member.summary: Creates a new IStorageReference pointing to the parent of the current reference or null if this instance references the root location. For example: path = foo/bar/baz parent = foo/bar path = foo parent = (root) path = (root) parent = null.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.Root
member.summary: Creates a new IStorageReference pointing to the root object.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.Bucket
member.summary: The name of the Google Cloud Storage bucket associated with this reference, in gs://bucket/path/to/object.txt, the bucket would be: ‘bucket’.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.Name
member.summary: The short name of the object associated with this reference, in gs://bucket/path/to/object.txt, the name of the object would be: ‘object.txt’

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageReference.FullPath
member.summary: The full path to this object, not including the Google Cloud Storage bucket. In gs://bucket/path/to/object.txt, the full path would be: ‘path/to/object.txt’

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot
member.summary: IStorageTaskSnapshot represents an immutable view of a task. A Snapshot contains a task, storage reference, metadata (if it exists), progress, and an error (if one occurred).

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot.TransferredUnitCount
member.summary: The total bytes uploaded so far.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot.TotalUnitCount
member.summary: The number of bytes to upload. Will return -1 if uploading from a stream.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot.TransferredFraction
member.summary: The total bytes uploaded so far as a fraction.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot.Metadata
member.summary: Metadata returned by the task, or null if no metadata returned.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot.Error
member.summary: Error during task execution, or null if no error occurred.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTransferTask
member.summary: A controllable Task that has a synchronized state machine.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTransferTask.AddObserver(Plugin.Firebase.Storage.StorageTaskStatus,System.Action{Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot})
member.summary: Observes changes in the upload status: Progress, Pause, Success, and Failure.
member.param: A callback that fires every time the status event occurs, returns a IStorageTaskSnapshot containing the state of the task.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTransferTask.RemoveObserver(System.Action{Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTaskSnapshot})
member.summary: Removes the single observer action.
member.param: The observer action of the task to remove.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTransferTask.Pause
member.summary: Attempts to pause the task.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTransferTask.Resume
member.summary: Attempts to resume a paused task.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Storage.IStorageTransferTask.Cancel
member.summary: Attempts to cancel the task.
